---
title: 'Labels & Boundaries Disappear.'
date: '2017-08-31T02:45:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Topos Men'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '8233068306713281678'
blogger_filename: '/2017/08/labels-boundaries-disappear.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Topos Men/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Observation'
  - 'Topos'
---

<span data-offset-key="cpndj-0-0" style="background-color: white; color: #1d2129; font-family: Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; white-space: pre-wrap;"><span data-text="true" style="font-family: inherit;"><br /></span></span>
<span data-offset-key="cpndj-0-0" style="background-color: white; color: #1d2129; font-family: Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; white-space: pre-wrap;"><span data-text="true" style="font-family: inherit;">Watching a group of men, ranging from 10 to 40 all playing </span></span><span class="_5zk7" data-offset-key="cpndj-1-0" spellcheck="false" style="background-color: rgba(88, 144, 255, 0.15); border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(88, 144, 255, 0.3); color: #1d2129; font-family: Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; white-space: pre-wrap;"><span data-offset-key="cpndj-1-0" style="font-family: inherit;"><span data-text="true" style="font-family: inherit;">#Pokemon</span></span></span><span data-offset-key="cpndj-2-0" style="background-color: white; color: #1d2129; font-family: Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; white-space: pre-wrap;"><span data-text="true" style="font-family: inherit;">. Once a common interest is found, all the age boundaries and labels disappear. Interesting.</span></span><br />
<span data-offset-key="cpndj-2-0" style="background-color: white; color: #1d2129; font-family: Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; white-space: pre-wrap;"><span data-text="true" style="font-family: inherit;"><br /></span></span>
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20170830-193803703-64076c45aeb4.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="1200" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20170830-193803703-bbc5cbfdf9fc.jpg" width="240" /></a></div>
<span data-offset-key="cpndj-2-0" style="background-color: white; color: #1d2129; font-family: Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; white-space: pre-wrap;"><span data-text="true" style="font-family: inherit;"><br /></span></span>
<span data-offset-key="cpndj-2-0" style="background-color: white; color: #1d2129; font-family: Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; white-space: pre-wrap;"><span data-text="true" style="font-family: inherit;"><br /></span></span>
<span data-offset-key="cpndj-2-0" style="background-color: white; color: #1d2129; font-family: Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; white-space: pre-wrap;"><span data-text="true" style="font-family: inherit;"><br /></span></span>
<span data-offset-key="cpndj-2-0" style="background-color: white; color: #1d2129; font-family: Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; white-space: pre-wrap;"><span data-text="true" style="font-family: inherit;">Darrell - Topos Man</span></span>
